categories.name: API Health
categories.rationale: Backend must respond before UI tests make sense

categories.name: Execution Matrix (homepage)
categories.rationale: Source of truth page — all other pages validate against this

categories.name: Engine Control
categories.rationale: Engine v3 live run monitoring, recently modified (MT-86)

categories.name: Data Consistency Gauntlet
categories.rationale: THE #1 BUG: 4 independent data sources with 3 different definitions of 'loaded'. Compares /api/entities vs /api/entity-digest vs /api/control-plane vs /api/executive vs /api/pipeline-matrix vs /api/load-progress vs /api/lakehouse-counts. Catches phantom loads, stale digest, medallion flow violations.

rootCauseAnalysis.DigestEngine: sp_BuildEntityDigest — any log record = loaded (includes failures)

categories.name: UI Number Scraping
categories.rationale: Scrapes numbers from DOM on each page and compares to API values. Catches frontend rendering bugs where API is right but page shows wrong numbers.

categories.name: Visual Readability
categories.rationale: Checks 8 critical pages for: transparent backgrounds hiding text, low contrast, table cell collisions, overflow clipping. Catches glassmorphism readability issues.

categories.name: Record Counts
categories.rationale: Being migrated to Entity Digest endpoint (MT-88)

categories.name: Execution Log
categories.rationale: Primary debugging page for load failures
